initial_prediction_data.review_text: I bought these for my 11-year-old’s PE class after he tried them on during a mall run. He has a wide foot (size 6 youth/7 men’s) and the 7 fit him with just enough wiggle room for thicker socks. First impressions: super light—he said they feel like “nothing” on his feet—yet the cushioned heel still absorbs sidewalk shock on our mile walk to school. The leather strips do keep his foot from sliding around, but they also trap heat a bit, so his socks were damp after a sweaty recess. Mesh breathes well otherwise and hasn’t snagged after two weeks of asphalt kickball. Sole grip is decent in the gym but sketchy on wet grass; he slipped once chasing the dog. They clean up with a quick wipe but the bright white midsole shows dirt fast. For $45 I’m happy, but we’ll see how long the foam bounce lasts—if it bottoms out before the semester’s over, I’ll update. Four stars for comfort and value, minus one for dirt magnet outsole and mediocre wet traction.

I got this because both my son and I have a pro controller and I wanted to be able to easily differentiate mine.

Pros: technically comes with everything you need to install, great colors, easy install, feels great.

Cons: the included screwdriver is a tad bit bigger than the screw in the controller, so either use your own or be careful not to round out your screws, one back side edge isn't completely flush with the controller (I've stopped noticing though, got used to it).

Honestly, they're not half bad, I like them!

Edges sit flush except for a 1-mm gap near the shoulder buttons, nothing you notice while playing. Colors match the product photos, though the matte picks up snack dust fast; a baby-wipe cleans it. Overall great upgrade for $17, just not a five-minute swap. Four stars.
